news.title_en: Solana DeFi TVL Rises 12% This Week
news.summary_zh: DeFiLlama数据显示，Solana生态总锁仓量本周上涨12%，主要得益于新晋DEX交易量增长。
news.summary_en: According to DeFiLlama, Solana's total value locked (TVL) increased 12% this week, driven by growing trading volumes on new DEXes.

news.title_zh: Cardano 公布2026年Plutus V4升级路线图
news.title_en: Cardano Unveils 2026 Plutus V4 Upgrade Roadmap
news.summary_zh: IOG团队发布Plutus V4路线图，预计Q3上线主网，将提升智能合约表达能力并降低手续费。
news.summary_en: IOG released the Plutus V4 roadmap, targeting mainnet launch in Q3 2026, enabling stronger smart contract expressiveness and lower fees.

news.summary_zh: Chainlink跨链互操作协议CCIP宣布新增支持Avalanche、Polygon zkEVM、Base、Arbitrum和Optimism五条主流公链。
news.summary_en: Chainlink’s Cross-Chain Interoperability Protocol (CCIP) now supports Avalanche, Polygon zkEVM, Base, Arbitrum, and Optimism, expanding multi-chain connectivity.

news.title_zh: 狗狗币拟引入ZK-Rollup二层方案
news.title_en: Dogecoin Proposes ZK-Rollup Layer2 Scaling Solution
news.summary_zh: Dogecoin基金会发布草案，拟基于ZK-Rollup构建Layer2扩容方案，目标降低小额转账手续费。
news.summary_en: The Dogecoin Foundation released a draft exploring a ZK-Rollup-based Layer2 scaling solution aimed at reducing fees for small transactions.
